# Coloris

Vendored copy of Coloris 0.25.0 for the StarterKit Theme Builder color controls.

Source:
- https://github.com/mdbassit/Coloris
- https://coloris.js.org/

Files:
- `coloris.min.css`
- `coloris.min.js`
- `LICENSE`

To update, download the matching `dist/coloris.min.css` and `dist/coloris.min.js` files from a fixed Coloris release or tag, then update this README with the new version.
